supportive_care_variants.illness_supportive: Recommended supportive care with OTC medications as needed with an emphasis on hydration. Return precautions given including increasing pain, worsening fever, dehydration, new symptoms, prolonged symptoms, worsening symptoms, and other concerns. Caregiver expressed understanding and agreement with treatment plan.
supportive_care_variants.illness_supportive_no_hydration: Recommended supportive care with OTC medications as needed. Return precautions given including increasing pain, worsening fever, dehydration, new symptoms, prolonged symptoms, worsening symptoms, and other concerns. Caregiver expressed understanding and agreement with treatment plan.
supportive_care_variants.injury_supportive: Recommended supportive care with Tylenol, Motrin, rest, ice, compression, elevation, and gradual return to activity as appropriate. Return precautions given including increasing pain, swelling, or failure to improve.

risk_statement_variants: Risk of untreated otitis media includes persistent pain and fever, hearing loss, and mastoiditis.
Risk of untreated strep throat includes rheumatic fever and peritonsillar abscess. This problem is moderate risk due to pending lab results which may necessitate further pharmacologic management.
Patient is at risk for worsening respiratory distress and clinical deterioration, which would need emergency room care or hospital admission.
Patient is at risk for dehydration, which would warrant emergency room care or admission for IV fluids.
Patient is at risk for worsening respiratory distress and clinical deterioration.

bullet_pattern_families.description: Comma-separated list of medication options for treatment selection
examples: Amoxicillin, Augmentin, Cefprozil, Azithromycin, Rocephin
Augmentin, Clindamycin
Zoloft, Prozac
Keflex, Clindamycin

bullet_pattern_families.description: Comma-separated follow-up interval options (often with 'Follow-up:' prefix)
examples: PRN, in 2-4 weeks for ear recheck, in 4-8 weeks for ear recheck
Follow-up: Tomorrow, 2-3 days, 1 week, 2 weeks, 2-4 weeks, 4 weeks, 4-8 weeks, next well child check
Follow-up in one month, Follow-up in three months, Follow-up next well child check
Referred to Audiology, Referred to ENT for further evaluation
Nutrition referral, Cardiology referral for EKG, Psychology referral, Psychiatry referral, GI referral
Physical therapy referral, Orthopedics referral
Speech Therapy/Audiology, Physical Therapy, Occupational Therapy, Developmental Pediatrics, Psychology, ABA

bullet_pattern_families.description: Comma-separated list of laboratory tests or studies to order
examples: CBC, CMP, ESR, CRP, Uric Acid, LDH, IGRA, and chest x-ray
CBC, CMP, ESR, CRP, Fecal Calprotectin, Celiac Disease Panel, Vitamin D, TSH/Free-T4
CBC, peripheral smear, PT, PTT/INR, vWB panel

bullet_pattern_families.description: Comma-separated list of exam finding locations or possibilities
examples: Crackles, wheeze in LLL, LUL, RUL, RML, RLL, throughout
Primarily RLQ, RUQ, LLQ, LUQ, epigastric, periumbilical, generalized
LLL, LUL, RUL, RML, RLL

bullet_pattern_families.description: Positive/negative exam finding pairs or two-scenario choices separated by commas
examples: Exam reassuring will defer XR given ottawa ankle rules, Given exam findings will obtain XR
Exam reassuring will defer XR after shared decision making, Given exam findings will obtain XR
Good weight gain and reassuring exam, poor weight gain, weight loss

bullet_pattern_families.description: Comma-separated self-harm scenarios for mental health entries
examples: No thoughts of self harm, has thoughts of self harm but without plan
Patient reports thoughts of self harm with plan of X, will send to ED for initial stabilization and further evaluation and treatment
After shared decision making plan to increase dose of medication with goal of improving effect, decrease dose of medication with goal of decreasing side effects, change medication

bullet_pattern_families.description: Two options after shared decision making, separated by comma
examples: after shared decision making will send Orapred 1mg/kg once daily for 3 days, after shared decision making will defer oral steroids
Discussed possible benefits and side effects of Tamiflu and after shared decision making will defer, Tamiflu prescribed
after shared decision making plan to start medication, defer medication for now

bullet_pattern_families.description: Single simple statement bullet (no comma-separated options)
examples: Stable for outpatient management but strict return precautions emphasized
Emphasized close return precautions
Discussed with family; answered all questions
Follow-up PRN
Emphasized close return precautions if rash fails to improve, keeps spreading, or changes in characteristics
Emphasized close return precautions
Strict return precautions emphasized
KUB, Abdominal ultrasound, CT Abdomen WO, CT Abdomen W, CT Abdomen/Pelvis WO, CT Abdomen/Pelvis W
CXR shows ***, CXR deferred due to exam findings

bullet_pattern_families.description: Comma-separated test result or diagnostic certainty options
examples: Rapid strep positive, Strep PCR positive, Throat culture positive
Strep negative, monospot positive
Negative Chlamydia Urine PCR, no current concern for PID
Negative Gonorrhea Urine PCR, no current concern for PID

bullet_pattern_families.description: Bullet about sending to ED for further evaluation
examples: Given concern for mastoiditis plan to send patient to ED for further evaluation and treatment
Recommended going to ED for further evaluation
ED for immediate evaluation
